summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of Vertiv BOM Grid modern design updates. All major functionality working correctly with improved design elements.
passed_tests: Dashboard loads with updated rounded KPI cards (rounded-2xl corners)
Roboto Slab font configured for headings (serif style)
KPI cards have proper shadows and hover effects (card-shadow utilities)
Navigation between Dashboard, BOM Grid, and CO Readiness Review works
BOM Grid displays 13 items properly with no text truncation
Grid container has rounded corners (rounded-2xl class)
Role toggle buttons are rounded and functional (Engineering, Procurement, PM)
Role-specific columns display correctly based on selected role
Pre-CO items are properly highlighted with orange badges
BOM data shows comprehensive information (readiness, blockers, status)
CO Readiness Review page renders with proper categorization
Color-coded readiness categories work (Ready, In Progress, At Risk, Blocked)
Navigation breadcrumbs and back buttons work
Modern orange color scheme applied consistently
Responsive layout maintains readability at 1920x1080 resolution
